Subject: Hamas suggests Biden's comments on hostage deal were premature: Live updates

<td id="Card10919966" class="container GridSmall" width="295" height="240" style="background-color: #FFFFFF; vertical-align: top; ">

    <table width="295" height="100%" align="center" style="height: 100%; background-color: #FFFFFF; " cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0">
        <tbody>
            <tr height="160" style="box-shadow: 0px 5px 0px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); ">
                <td>
                    <a id="Href10919966" style="color: #333333;border: none;text-decoration: none;" href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?r=AIAACQRW2LNMPZWAWIG5KJHY5MLHUW5ZKVRUUDXPQEWUVIKJTDFLQ7VS32V2PSSNNXBTREWP3JF6JXUI3IPU6VXM32R6AIWW6TWJNULO4QUQWJBHX2K5JPQI6UJQGQ5VFHOWMYLRKCJO4OU3TB7AN2EBYBQMWISXYLWQBJNZF3HRZIMNPGDIE5FEBBEBEGGIE2YZYLWMYKSKB6LIZ7GH7ONXCOXYTVCZPWMQG5BN2R3NT4N7DZPNWD7CUBMDK3GRBWCQISOVFPYM224JN6VX3VJGTLWFKIA&d=AIAAC3PVMAILIFYUI6JDTKQSGZT3QYFMEOWYS54XMQQ75MQNZAEI2RWUKYPDK6N25XR4Q6VYGPMZXKU2HIZX35P6N3YRFO7HNLNJ4WIHPKCGDIYUYPBN723IBX4IB5DFOPQYJQWVT6FND4BZMYC6B4KXENMMK2IGUGPIBOIRDCYH67OJ3QX6SVSC&" target="_blank">
                        <img id="Img10919966" width="295" height="160" style="border: none; display: block; margin: 0px 0px 0px 0px;" src="https://th.bing.com/th?id=ORMS.a47b9c258c031b57bdbb6da9e985281e&pid=Wdp&w=295&h=160&dpr=1&c=8&rs=2">

                </td>
            </tr>

            <tr style="height: 100%;">
                <td id="Title10919966" style="padding: 10px 10px 0px 10px; font-family: Segoe UI,Helvetica,Arial,Verdana,sans-serif; font-size: 15px; color: #333333; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: top; background-color: #FFFFFF;" width="295" height="40">
                    <a id="Href10919966" style="color: #333333;border: none;text-decoration: none;" href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?r=AIAACHGNORDQ4V2N5JQIAYJXQK732YB2BLTKSSKIHXYYMF3QFTSEKXK6CDPROP2X3ICFC2EYO3Y3JP22TPRA2PZ3VKP5IWAR23DFGH63FXQEDEDRSSDCIEL2MXYIEZ3NCDUHTMTFNVFZX7T7H7FLZ3HQG7ALYF4RR54RWXMQLHNOHLNDXSDXCWQNZHXXRTZB6WRWXF4CMPAO65ACFYCI4NOQRWIU2YXPQ2EJAQIRAOS644AOLNBXZGNGWA6CF2H3BBFSYIIWBN2VCZSZO6MFEC5XYVLJ7NA&d=AIAAC4PJHZV6E2YVJH6KKJY6RRHGLRASVORBBN427JQSOBTOOSBSTVRMPOJY2ZRAH6BO2B4URL7XNWZWPVRORI5IRNBVEHGYUYCSYSQSRJZQRDE7P722P7XR2GGM7XCJSQ6AXFQ4VVLLRGYSOYW35XMUL4OBT7JPPVZUOD5T3Y4KWLSU2XGU3HW2&" target="_blank">
                        Map Reveals Joe Biden's Approval Rating by State

                </td>
            </tr>
